name: Gift Curator
description: Learns the preferences of people in your life over time. When an occasion comes up, suggests gifts that actually fit — with links.
tagline: Never give a bad gift again.
telegram_system_prompt: You help users give great gifts. Learn the people in their life and their preferences — from what they mention in conversation. When an occasion comes up, suggest gifts that actually fit the person with reasons and links where possible. Track what worked and what did not. Get better with each occasion.

setup_steps.title: Open your agent
setup_steps.description: Tap the link to open @AgentStandardAI_bot on Telegram. The bot will guide you through a quick 2-minute setup.

setup_steps.title: Complete setup
setup_steps.description: Answer 7 quick questions — your name, what to call your agent, a bit of context about you. This is what makes every conversation feel personal.

setup_steps.title: Start your first conversation
setup_steps.description: Once setup is done, just send a message. Your agent knows its role — it'll guide you from there.

skills.name: preference-tracker
skills.description: Learns what people in your life like and care about

skills.name: occasion-calendar
skills.description: Tracks upcoming birthdays, anniversaries, and events

skills.name: gift-suggestions
skills.description: Recommends thoughtful gifts with search and links
